summary: Phase 4 testing completed successfully. All new features working: Multi-mode system with shared context, debug panel, actionable insights, and meal AI analysis. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All flows functional.

/api/agents/debug returns orchestration status and recent decisions
